Sign in to CRONOS.WTF

Enter your Crypto.com NFT username to access your profile directly.

No password needed — your profile is public on Crypto.com NFT.

Certify account ownership
Optional — prove you own this Crypto.com NFT account

Use Crypto.com's built-in verification key (valid 5 min) to confirm ownership. This never shares your password.

  1. Open Crypto.com NFT → Settings → Verification
  2. Click Generate a secret key
  3. Paste the key below (expires in 5 minutes)

SUPPORT

Help keep the platform alive — free, ad-free, paywall-free

CRONOS.WTF was born from a simple desire: give the Cronos NFT community a tool that actually works. Profile explorer, live stats, collection browser, real-time sales & listing bots — every single feature was crafted from scratch, tested, and refined over many months.

It costs real money — servers, API calls, development time — and a huge amount of personal hours. There's no monetisation, no VC funding, no token. Just someone who cares about the ecosystem enough to keep building.

If this platform has ever helped you find a deal, track a collection, or simply understand the market better — a small contribution keeps it alive and lets it grow.

Where your contribution goes

⚡
Faster updates
More frequent releases, quicker bug fixes
🛡️
Better hosting
Faster load times, higher reliability
🔭
New tools
Room to ship the next feature you'll want
🌱
Free forever
No ads, no paywall — kept that way by you

CRONOS.WTF

Browse Smarter, Collect Better

01/08

WTF Community

Where the Crypto.com NFT scene meets. Chat live with collectors and creators, drop any #collection straight into the conversation, @mention members, react and reply — all in one feed. Plus this week's Featured Artists and Collections, hand-picked from the community.

Join the Chat →
02/08

Market Stats

The full Crypto.com NFT market at a glance. Live rankings by volume, floor, buyers — across 24H, 7D and 30D.

View Stats →
03/08

Sales/Listings Bot

Watch every sale and listing across your Crypto.com NFT collections in real time. Set price alarms, follow the floor, never miss a deal.

Open Bot →
04/08

NFT Drops

Every Crypto.com NFT drop in one timeline — from featured collections to unverified artists looking to break through. Live mints, upcoming releases, prices and supply.

View Drops →
05/08

Snapshot

Who really owns the collection? Live holder snapshot — wallet counts, concentration, distribution — for any Crypto.com NFT collection.

Open Snapshot →
06/08

Support

Built solo, out of pocket, late nights stacking up — every tool you've used on CRONOS.WTF stays online because patrons make sure it does.

Become a Patron →
07/08

Profile Explorer

Explore any Crypto.com NFT profile in detail. Holdings grouped by collection or artist, liked NFTs, full stats — search instantly.

Search a Profile →
08/08

Collection Explorer

Dive into any Crypto.com NFT collection. Every NFT with rarity ranks, floor prices and live market data.

Open a Collection →
